_meta.description: Encodable trading rules derived from a decade of BET drivers. Each rule has a machine-checkable trigger, direction, horizon, expected magnitude band, and exit. Strength reflects hit-rate in the 2015-2026 sample.

metric_glossary.eur_ron_close_streak_days: Consecutive sessions close has held the condition
metric_glossary.ro_5y_cds_bp: Romania 5Y sovereign CDS in basis points
metric_glossary.ro_5y_cds_delta_wk_bp: Week-on-week change in RO 5Y CDS, bp
metric_glossary.hu_pl_cds_concurrent_move: Whether HU/PL CDS moved equivalently (filters global vs. idiosyncratic)
metric_glossary.ttf_weekly_pct: TTF natural gas week-on-week percent change
metric_glossary.reservoirs_pct_norm: Romanian hydro reservoir level as percent of seasonal norm
metric_glossary.reservoirs_below_norm_weeks: Consecutive weeks reservoirs have been < threshold
metric_glossary.cpi_surprise_pp: CPI print minus consensus, in percentage points
metric_glossary.fiscal_ordinance_leak: Finance Ministry press briefing signaling listed-SOE targeted fiscal measure
metric_glossary.election_first_round_antisystem_lead: Sunday exit poll shows anti-system candidate in 1st-round lead
metric_glossary.court_resolution_post_selloff: Official/judicial resolution after BET sold off >5% on political event
metric_glossary.pnrr_approval: EC approved a PNRR payment request
metric_glossary.pnrr_milestone_fail: PNRR milestone failed with payment suspension
metric_glossary.ftse_event_days_to_effective: Days until FTSE GEIS rebalance effective date
metric_glossary.msci_upgrade_emerging: MSCI upgraded Romania from Advanced Frontier to Emerging
metric_glossary.ukraine_escalation_within_100km_ro: Credible military escalation within 100km of Romanian border
metric_glossary.ukraine_ceasefire_credible: Credible Ukraine ceasefire or truce signal
metric_glossary.date_range: Current calendar date falls in a named window (e.g. 'jul15_aug20')
metric_glossary.ex_div_cluster_day: Day is in the May-July BET blue-chip ex-dividend cluster
metric_glossary.regime_score: Composite REGIME-1 or REGIME-2 weighted score

action_glossary.short_bet: Reduce BET index exposure / open defensive shorts
action_glossary.long_bet: Add BET index exposure / add longs
action_glossary.reduce_size: Cut active position sizes by a percentage
action_glossary.widen_stops: Increase stop-loss distance for current positions
action_glossary.no_trade: Do not treat as signal; skip or adjust for mechanical effect

notes: All thresholds are central estimates from 2015-2026. Hit rate degrades under regime change.
Rules are AND-composed within a single rule. Multi-family confirmation (scoring) lives in REGIME-1/REGIME-2.
Confidence bands: strong (>70% in-sample hit), moderate (50-70%), weak (<50%, directional only).

April 2026 caveat: all three rating agencies sit at BBB-/Baa3 Negative. RATAG-2 tail is live; trend-following signals are degraded because the 70% YoY rally into ATH biases price discovery toward mean-reversion.

rules.title: EUR/RON >5.05 sustained with CDS widening
rules.trigger_text: EUR/RON close >5.05 for 2 consecutive days AND RO 5Y CDS widened >15bp week-on-week

rules.title: NBR intervention reversal — banks rebound
rules.trigger_text: EUR/RON drops -0.5% intraday after confirmed NBR intervention

rules.title: EUR/RON band-break above 5.10
rules.trigger_text: EUR/RON >5.10 break after 30-day range held at 5.05-5.10
rules.notes: May 5 2025 set the precedent: break of 5.00 led to RO 10Y spike to 8.0% and junk-like Eurobond spreads.

rules.title: DAX overnight gap down
rules.trigger_text: DAX futures -1.5% or worse at BVB open (09:45 EET)
rules.notes: BET follows ~60% of DAX overnight move in first 2 hours.

rules.title: BET catch-up vs CEE peers
rules.trigger_text: WIG20 +1% AND BUX +1% AND BET flat for 2 sessions

rules.title: VIX spike
rules.trigger_text: VIX 1-day pct change >30% AND VIX close >25

rules.title: Brent daily spike
rules.trigger_text: Brent +4% in one session
rules.notes: SNP beta to Brent ~0.5-0.7. Brent correlation 0.60-0.75.

rules.title: TTF supply disruption spike
rules.trigger_text: TTF jumps >10% w/w on supply disruption
rules.notes: Post-OUG 27/2022 windfall caps dampened SNG sensitivity from 0.70 to 0.30. Needs TTF >€50/MWh to meaningfully fire.

rules.title: Hydrology drought signal
rules.trigger_text: Romanian reservoirs <70% of seasonal norm for 4+ weeks in summer

rules.title: RO 10Y breakout
rules.trigger_text: RO 10Y close >7.40% AND 10-day move >+40bp

rules.title: CDS idiosyncratic blowout
rules.trigger_text: RO 5Y CDS +20bp in 3 sessions with no HU/PL equivalent move

rules.title: NBR first-cut pre-positioning
rules.trigger_text: Confirmed NBR first cut at upcoming meeting (priced + communicated)
rules.notes: Live as of April 2026 for the expected May 2026 meeting — high-conviction near-term trade.

rules.title: CPI upside surprise
rules.trigger_text: CPI print >+0.3pp above consensus

rules.title: Fiscal-ordinance leak
rules.trigger_text: New fiscal package targeting listed SOEs announced / leaked
rules.exit_condition: Target hit or softening signal from MoF
rules.notes: Highest-conviction short in the dataset. OUG 114/2018 template: -11.2% in 2 sessions. Monitor 'Ministerul Finanțelor pregătește' headline pattern on weekends.

rules.title: Sunday election anti-system 1st-round lead
rules.trigger_text: Sunday exit poll shows anti-system candidate in 1st-round lead
rules.notes: Nov 24 2024 (Georgescu) BET -1.45% Monday, mid-caps -3 to -7.6%. May 4 2025 (Simion) BET -2.52%, EUR/RON broke 5.00.

rules.title: Relief rally on resolution
rules.trigger_text: Court/official resolution after BET has sold off >5% on political event
rules.notes: Dec 6 2024 annulment: +3.0%. May 19 2025 Dan runoff win: +3.5% Monday, +7% through May 28.

rules.title: PNRR disbursement approval
rules.trigger_text: EC approved a PNRR payment request

rules.title: PNRR milestone failure
rules.trigger_text: PNRR milestone failed with payment suspension

rules.title: Ex-dividend cluster day
rules.trigger_text: Day is in the May-July blue-chip ex-dividend cluster
rules.notes: June alone drags BET -2 to -4% mechanically. Do NOT treat ex-div drop as sell signal.

rules.title: Summer liquidity collapse
rules.trigger_text: Current date in window Jul 15 - Aug 20

rules.title: Year-end window-dressing
rules.trigger_text: Current date in window Dec 15 - Dec 30

rules.title: Outlook cut to Negative
rules.trigger_text: Any agency outlook changed Stable → Negative

rules.title: Downgrade to junk — tail event
rules.trigger_text: Any agency downgrades RO to BB+/Ba1 (junk)
rules.notes: April 2026 configuration is the highest-risk in the dataset for this outcome. Engine should hold this as a persistent tripwire. Reduce longs to 20%, consider outright short.

rules.title: Affirmation after feared review
rules.trigger_text: Agency affirms BBB- with no deterioration after a feared review

rules.title: FTSE rebalance window
rules.trigger_text: 40 days before FTSE GEIS effective date

rules.title: MSCI EM upgrade review
rules.trigger_text: MSCI June 2026 review upgrades Romania from Advanced Frontier to Emerging
rules.notes: Estimated $180m passive inflows. Basket: TLV, H2O, SNP, BRD. Live review window: June 2026.

rules.title: Ukraine escalation near RO border
rules.trigger_text: Credible Ukraine escalation within 100km of RO border

rules.title: Ukraine ceasefire / truce
rules.trigger_text: Credible Ukraine ceasefire or truce signal
rules.notes: Basket: TGN (BRUA/Vertical Corridor), TRP (construction/PVC), any construction name.

rules.title: Risk-off score
rules.trigger_text: Weighted score ≥5 triggers max-defensive posture

rules.title: Risk-on score
rules.trigger_text: Weighted score ≥6 triggers max-long posture
